nasb.text: I will get up and go to my father, and will say to him, “Father, I have sinned against heaven, and in your sight;

esv.text: I will arise and go to my father, and I will say to him, “Father, I have sinned against heaven and before you.

cnv.text: 我要起來，到我父親那裡去，對他說：爸爸，我得罪了天，也得罪了你，

ccb.text: 我要动身回到我父亲身边，对他说，父亲，我得罪了天，也得罪了你，

csbs.text: 我要起来，到我父亲那里去，对他说：‘父亲，我对天犯了罪，也在你面前犯了罪。
